parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ai.hourly_pulse (agent_name, pulse_at, status, summary, metrics)
VALUES (
  'self_healing',
  NOW(),
  $1,
  $2,
  $3::jsonb
)
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.status, $json.total_recent_failures + ' failures in last 4h, ' + $json.workflows_affected + ' wfs affected, ' + $json.critical_count + ' critical', JSON.stringify($json)] }}

parameters.text:
={{ '🩺 *Self-Healing 4h check*

' + $('Classify errors').item.json.total_recent_failures + ' failures detected
' + $('Classify errors').item.json.workflows_affected + ' workflows affected
' + $('Classify errors').item.json.critical_count + ' need manual review

First critical: ' + ($('Classify errors').item.json.critical_first_5.length ? $('Classify errors').item.json.critical_first_5[0].wf + ' (exec ' + $('Classify errors').item.json.critical_first_5[0].exec + ')' : 'none') }}
